content_body: Our agency rented this home for a corporate retreat. The pictures do not do justice to how incredibly beautiful this home is! As soon as you walk in the door, you are in awe of the quality and beauty of the home. We were greeted with music playing and the air turned on so that we would be comfortable as soon as we stepped into the home! The kitchen is state of the art with everything you will need to cook any type of dinner. The bedrooms were very welcoming with samples of soap and other goodies placed on the bed with extra fluffy towels. All three floors offered opportunities for relaxing! There is a sun porch that called us to take time to relax and enjoy the view! The outdoor fireplace was a great gathering place at night to reflect on our thoughts for the day and to gaze at the stars. I highly recommend this house! The price is excellent for such a quality home. We are very thankful to have had such a beautiful, restful setting for our retreat and plan on returning next year!
title: Corporate Retreat in North GA Mountains
